stories.title: Follow live: Netherlands, Morocco clash in round-o...
Paraguay stun Germany on pens after VAR drama
stories.summary: Kai Havertz, Nick Woltemade and Jonathan Tah missed crucial penalties as Germany were eliminated from the World Cup in a shootout by Paraguay.

stories.title: Sources: RFA Duren to meet with Lakers, Kings
stories.summary: Pistons restricted free agent Jalen Duren has a pair of meetings set up with the Lakers and Kings when free agency begins in earnest on Tuesday.

stories.title: Sources: Grizzlies trading star Morant to Blazers
stories.summary: The Memphis Grizzlies are trading two-time All-Star Ja Morant to the Portland Trail Blazers for Jerami Grant and Kris Murray, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Lions release Arnold after CB's bond set at $1M
stories.summary: The Lions have released Terrion Arnold after he was arrested last week on felony charges of armed robbery and kidnapping, the team announced Monday.
